name: Quick Chicken Taj Mahal
recipeIngredient: 1 pound skinless boneless chicken breast, cut into 1-inch pieces
1/3 cup dried apricots or peaches, cut into 1-inch cubes
1/3 cup blanched slivered almonds, toasted for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large pan.
2. Add the chicken and onion; stir-fry 10 minutes until the chicken is well browned on all sides and the onion is soft.
3. Stir in 1 1/2 cups of the chicken broth, raisins or currants, dried fruit, saffron-lemon juice mixture, turmeric, fenugreek (if using), cinnamon, cayenne pepper, and coriander seed.
4. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 5 to 10 minutes until the chicken is cooked through and flavors are well combined.
6. Add salt and pepper to taste.
7. Garnish with toasted almonds.
